projects.Title: Career Coach SaaS
projects.Description: Built full-stack AI-powered career platform with resume analysis, mock interviews, and personalized roadmaps using Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and OpenAI. Developed scalable REST APIs, authentication, monorepo architecture, and production-ready backend structure.

projects.Title: Smart Health Risk Predictor
projects.Description: Built AI healthcare platform predicting disease risks using ML models with FastAPI backend and React dashboard. Implemented secure authentication, REST APIs, automated ML pipeline, and health data visualization system.
